svg.title: MedLynq v3 — end-to-end workflow flowchart
svg.desc: From pre-authorization through capture, Lynq AI brain, Pulse review, NHCX submission, query loop and CFO outcomes. Six swim lanes show who owns each step.
svg.text: Pre-auth → capture → Lynq → Pulse → NHCX → CFO. Six swim lanes show ownership. Decision diamonds show prevention & query loops. Numbered for demo narration.

g.text: No gallery write · encrypted offline queue · session-only thumbs · consent + audit per capture
Drug barcode webhook · HL7 labs NEW
Red badge on Pulse · ward push
20 · Query loop (5 steps · 45 sec end-to-end target)
New v2/v3 module (Evidence Locator · Packet Builder · Voice · Co-pilot · Insurer · Patient · ERP · etc.)
P1–P5 — Pre-authorization (cashless) lane. Runs before patient admission. Approved evidence is reused in the main claim — no double-capture.
1–5 — MedLynq Go mobile capture (photo · handwriting · voice). 5b/5c/5d — server-side parallel pulls + empanelment + consent checks.
6–12 — Central server & Lynq AI brain. Extract → decision → intelligence layer. Missing-doc loop returns to step 3 via ward push.
13–16 — MedLynq Pulse review (TPA · Doctor · Auditor share link). 17–21 — NHCX submission + 5-step query loop · UTR + Tally sync.
22–27 — CFO outcomes · insurer mirror · patient portal · network intelligence · data flywheel feeds Lynq back into next case.
